# growthbook_ramp_schedule_template (Resource)

A GrowthBook ramp schedule template. Ramp schedules define a sequence of steps that progressively adjust a feature rule's coverage/targeting, with optional hold gates and monitoring.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the ramp schedule template.
- `steps` (Attributes List) Ordered list of ramp steps. Write-only: not refreshed from the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps))

### Optional

- `end_patch` (Attributes) Patch applied to the feature rule when the schedule completes. Write-only: not refreshed from the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--end_patch))
- `lockdown_config` (Attributes) Lockdown configuration. Write-only: not refreshed from the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lockdown_config))
- `monitoring_config` (Attributes) Automated monitoring configuration for the rollout. Write-only: not refreshed from the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitoring_config))
- `official` (Boolean) Whether this is an organization-official template.
- `order` (Number) Display order within the org. Omit to append to the end.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique ramp schedule template identifier.

<a id="nestedatt--steps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps`

Required:

- `actions` (Attributes List) Actions applied at this step. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions))

Optional:

- `approval_notes` (String) Notes shown during approval.
- `hold_conditions` (Attributes) Conditions gating advancement to the next step. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--hold_conditions))
- `interval` (Number) Hold duration in seconds before this step's gates are evaluated. Null means no time gate.
- `monitored` (Boolean) Run A/B traffic analysis while this step is active.

<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions`

Required:

- `patch` (Attributes) Feature-rule patch applied at this step. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions--patch))
- `target_id` (String) ID of the targeted feature.
- `target_type` (String) Target type. Currently only `feature-rule`.

<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions--patch"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions.patch`

Required:

- `rule_id` (String) ID of the feature rule to patch.

Optional:

- `all_environments` (Boolean) Apply to all environments.
- `condition` (String) Targeting condition (JSON string).
- `coverage` (Number) Traffic fraction (0-1).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable the rule.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments to apply to (when not all).
- `prerequisites` (Attributes List) Feature prerequisites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--prerequisites))
- `saved_groups` (Attributes List) Saved group targeting clauses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--saved_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--prerequisites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions.patch.prerequisites`

Required:

- `condition` (String) Prerequisite condition (JSON string).
- `id` (String) Prerequisite feature ID.


<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--saved_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions.patch.saved_groups`

Required:

- `ids` (List of String) Saved group IDs.
- `match` (String) Match type: `all`, `any`, or `none`.




<a id="nestedatt--steps--hold_conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.hold_conditions`

Optional:

- `min_sample_size` (Number) Minimum sample size before advancing.
- `requires_approval` (Boolean) Require manual approval before advancing.



<a id="nestedatt--end_patch"></a>
### Nested Schema for `end_patch`

Optional:

- `all_environments` (Boolean) Apply to all environments.
- `condition` (String) Targeting condition (JSON string).
- `coverage` (Number) Traffic fraction (0-1).
- `environments` (List of String) Environments to apply to (when not all).
- `prerequisites` (Attributes List) Feature prerequisites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--end_patch--prerequisites))
- `saved_groups` (Attributes List) Saved group targeting clauses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--end_patch--saved_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--end_patch--prerequisites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `end_patch.prerequisites`

Required:

- `condition` (String) Prerequisite condition (JSON string).
- `id` (String) Prerequisite feature ID.


<a id="nestedatt--end_patch--saved_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `end_patch.saved_groups`

Required:

- `ids` (List of String) Saved group IDs.
- `match` (String) Match type: `all`, `any`, or `none`.



<a id="nestedatt--lockdown_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `lockdown_config`

Required:

- `mode` (String) Lockdown mode: `none` or `locked`.


<a id="nestedatt--monitoring_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitoring_config`

Required:

- `datasource_id` (String) Datasource ID for monitoring.
- `exposure_query_id` (String) Exposure query ID.
- `guardrail_metric_ids` (List of String) Guardrail metric IDs (at least one).

Optional:

- `auto_update` (Boolean) Automatically update analysis.
- `monitoring_mode` (String) Monitoring mode: `auto` or `manual`.
- `multiple_exposure_action` (String) Action on multiple exposures: `rollback`, `hold`, or `warn`.
- `no_traffic_action` (String) Action when no traffic: `rollback`, `hold`, or `warn`.
- `no_traffic_grace_period_hours` (Number) Hours to wait for traffic before applying the no-traffic action.
- `signal_metric_ids` (List of String) Signal metric IDs.
- `srm_action` (String) Action on SRM detection: `rollback`, `hold`, or `warn`.
- `update_schedule_minutes` (Number) Monitoring refresh interval in minutes (>= 10).
